description: Declarative registry classifying DevPilot tests by contract layer after POST-H-001. POST-H-010-A adds observability retention policy tests. POST-H-012-A adds sensitive action catalog validation. POST-H-013-A adds audit pack manifest v2 and local policy validation. POST-H-013-B adds audit pack builder v2 dry-run/execute validation.

validates: Plugin sandbox design quality gate remains metadata-only and blocks execution.
POST-H-019 closure keeps plugin execution blocked until future ADR.
notes: POST-H-019-D promotes this contract to quality-gate coverage for plugin-sandbox-design.
The gate validates registry, permission model, exposure report and plugin-ecosystem fixture without plugin execution.
POST-H-019-E closes this contract with metadata-only runbook and ADR trigger.
Plugin execution remains blocked by design after hito closure.
POST-H-020-B semantic validator only; no collector, report generator, certification, legal advice, network or external APIs.
POST-H-020-C report generator writes only requested runtime reports under outputs/reports and does not execute source_command values.
POST-H-020-D quality gate integration only; no certification, legal advice, external audit, network, external APIs or source mutations.
The registry documents and validates test intent; it does not dynamically execute pytest from JSON.
Historical sprint contracts must not validate mutable global project state.
POST-H-002-E adds post-h-002-maturity-dashboard as the closure contract for the local maturity dashboard.
POST-H-003-E adds the post-h-003-test-contract-registry-2 integration contract while preserving the v1 registry for compatibility.
POST-H-004-E registers MIASI semantic validator as a formal local, non-executing test contract.
POST-H-006-C adds post-h-006-cli-handler-migration as the incremental CLI handler migration contract.
POST-H-006-E adds no-growth gate contract post-h-006-cli-no-growth-gate.
POST-H-011-A adds a RAG groundedness schema/fixtures contract without executing RAG, using web search, external APIs or LLM judge.
POST-H-013-E registers audit-pack-integrity as a hardening quality-gate contract without executing external services or writing source files.
POST-H-015-A registers operator-dashboard schema/config tests without generating runtime outputs or enabling write actions.
POST-H-016-D registers secure CLI/API portfolio status integration and active-workspace non-mutation tests.
POST-H-016-E registers workspace-portfolio-hardening as the final quality gate contract for Workspace portfolio hardening.
POST-H-017-C registers source archive manifest and checksums contract without external services.
POST-H-017-E registers release-reproducibility quality gate and local pack generation contract.
POST-H-019-D promotes post-h-019-plugin-sandbox-design to quality-gate coverage without enabling plugin execution.
POST-H-019-E closes post-h-019-plugin-sandbox-design contract with runbook and ADR trigger.
POST-H-019-D corrective patch carried into E: TCR v2 execution_profile uses schema-valid release.
POST-H-020-C adds compliance evidence report contract.
POST-H-020-D registers compliance-mapping-pack as a hardening quality-gate contract without certification claims.
